TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-weaving_Kagaw

S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu' mu ga.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Kagaw Nawkeh。
My name is Kagaw Nawkeh.

S.FORM: ru yava' mu ga yukeh naupas.
S.TRANSL: 然後我爸爸的名字是Yukeh Naupas。
And my father is Yukeh Naupas.

S.FORM: i yaya' mu ga laway naupas.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字是Laway Naupas。
My mother is Laway Naupas.

S.FORM: ru yutas mu ga yupas na yupas.
S.TRANSL: 我爺爺叫Yupas na Talaw。
My grandfather is Yupas na Talaw.

S.FORM: ru kia na' yupas talaw ru talaw na kuwi' kuwi' qangqang ku nanavakis la.
S.TRANSL: 還有Yupas Talaw、Talaw na Kuwi'以及Kuwi' Qangqang這些祖先。
And there were still (other) elderly people—Yupas Talaw, Talaw na Kuwi', and Kuwi' Qangqang.

S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu' mu ru.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Kagaw Nawkeh。
My name is Kagaw, Kagaw nawkeh.

S.FORM: yaya' mu ga laway.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字叫Laway Naupas。
My mother is Laway Naupas.

S.FORM: ru ti su tataykay sami ga musa' sami i matawwaw ga.
S.TRANSL: 在我們小的時候，我們去工作。
When we were young, we went to work.

S.FORM: mutux sami musa' matawwaw ru rasun sami matawwaw ni yaya' mu ru ki yava' mu.
S.TRANSL: 我們會去工作，然後我爸爸媽媽會帶我們去工作。
We would go working, and my father and mother would bring us to work.

S.FORM: tataykay sami yu.
S.TRANSL: 我們還很小哦。
We were quite little children then.

S.FORM: ini' sami viru' na' ga.
S.TRANSL: 我們還沒唸書。
We had not studied by that time.

S.FORM: ru musa' sami i matawwaw.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們去工作。
And we went to work.

S.FORM: matawwaw su mamayah ka tatuvuxan ga tumuvux tumuvux ru kumluh.
S.TRANSL: (這些)工作就是去旱地播種，播種和收割。
The work was to do sowing in the dry land. (We) did sowing and reaping.

S.FORM: ru i mahangngiq sami la ga pasibaqan sami pasibaqan kung su tuminun ni yaki la.
S.TRANSL: 然後，我們休息的時候，年長的祖母會教我們編織。
And while we were having a rest, an elderly woman taught us how to weave.

S.FORM: i magalpu mamatu' kaal yu magalpu mamatu' kan ga vaq kung tuminun la pasipaqan kung ni yaki la ga vaq kung tuminun la.
S.TRANSL: 當我十六歲的時候，十六歲的時候，我就學會編織。Yaki教我，我就會了。
woman taught me about it, and then I knew how.

S.FORM: uwan ga mana'aring ru.
S.TRANSL: 是的，開始一直。
Yes, (we) started.

S.FORM: aru aruwa aruwa kung i vaq la ka.
S.TRANSL: 我愈來愈會(織布)。
I became more and more adept (at weaving).

S.FORM: paqibaqan mu kahavag ka yayihung na ta tuminun la ga.
S.TRANSL: 我學全部的編織方法，包括困難的。
I learned all of the weaving skills, including very difficult ones.

S.FORM: ru vaq kuing la a' vaq kuing la.
S.TRANSL: 然後我會了，我會。
And then, I knew how (to weave). I was able (to weave).

S.FORM: uwal uwal ga musa' matawwaw ru i tumuvux ru naqaru' ku tumuvux la ga.
S.TRANSL: 是的是的，去工作，然後。播種，然後結束播種。
Yes. Yes. (We) went to work and. We did the sowing and then finished it.

S.FORM: mahangniq imuwaw la ku nanavakis la sami ka nanavakis sunga' mahangniq i muwaw la ru.
S.TRANSL: 以前的老人們在家休息，我們這些老人(包括說話者自己，現在)以前在家休息。
In the past, the elderly rested at home, and now we the elder ones rested at home before.

S.FORM: tuminun ku kakanayrin ga musa' i qumluwap ku na tatamalung hiya'.
S.TRANSL: 婦女們編織，男人們去打獵。
Women did the weaving and Men went hunting.

S.FORM: musa' qumluwap ku tatamalung hiya' kumiyum su raramat mi.
S.TRANSL: 男人們去打獵，找菜。
Men went hunting, and looked for food.

S.FORM: i sunga' ga ini' vaynay su raramat ga ini' vaynay gi ukas a pila' ukas a patagasahuan ukas pila' ru musa' i i kumiyum su raramat lahulahu mi ku tatamalong.
S.TRANSL: 以前沒有買菜這種事。我們不會買東西吃，因為我們沒有錢，沒有賺錢的工作。我們沒有錢，而且男人們在山上找尋食物。
money. We had no money and men went to look for food in the mountains.

S.FORM: ga tuminun imuwag ku kakanayrin hiya' ru.
S.TRANSL: 在家編織是女人們的事。
Women did the weaving at home.

S.FORM: tiku raramat niyam ga yahu la.
S.TRANSL: 我們的菜是山茼蒿。
Fireweeds were for the meals.

S.FORM: yahu yahu vay i lahulahu.
S.TRANSL: 真的是山上的山茼蒿。
They were really fireweeds in the mountains.

S.FORM: kumiyut su yahu ru kiya tikay a paruxaw uwi gaghap na paruxaw ga.
S.TRANSL: 摘山茼蒿，然後有一點青菜和菜籽。
We plucked fireweeds and so we had some vegetable and seeds.

S.FORM: tumuvux tikay su paruxaw i mamayah ru nanu' yani ku siramat a.
S.TRANSL: 播一些菜籽在旱地，然後那邊種的就當菜來吃。
We sowed some of the seeds on the dry land, and what grew there was for eating.

S.FORM: vali i pakaavura' uwi.
S.TRANSL: 也沒有用油。
We did not use oil either.

S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus mi.
S.TRANSL: 沒有用油。
We used no oil.

S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus su raramat asi tahki na a qusia' ku raramat niyam su sunga'.
S.TRANSL: 沒有用油煮菜，以前還是只能用水煮。
We cooked without oil. In the past, our food could only be cooked with water.

S.FORM: ru mutux i ini' sami usa' hugal uwi mi gi i quwis gi ukas a pila' ka a'usa' quwis.
S.TRANSL: 還有我們也不會去下面(山下)，因為我們沒有錢去平地。
And we weren't able to go to the lower ground because we had no money to go to the lower ground.

S.FORM: ru ingasu la ru ru mutux i musa' hugal la ga.
S.TRANSL: 很久之後，然後，我們就能去下面囉。
After a long time, and we were able to go down to the lower ground.

S.FORM: musa' i kia kia pila' la matagasaihu' la tikay ga.
S.TRANSL: 去，嗯，有錢了，去工作賺了一點錢。
(We) went there. We had money. We went to work and earned some money.

S.FORM: kia pila' la ga musa' i mavaynay tikay su raramat i hugal la mi i quwis la.
S.TRANSL: 有錢之後我們會去下面平地買一點菜。
After having some money, we went to the lower ground to buy some food.

S.FORM: musa' mavaynay su ramat ru humakay yu vali i kiya kulu' sunga'.
S.TRANSL: 我們去買菜，然後用走的喲。以前沒有車子。
We went to buy food, and we did so on foot. There was no car before.

S.FORM: musa' pakaragiyax ga humakay ru.
S.TRANSL: 我走路去大湖。
(I) walked to Pakaragiyax.

S.FORM: mutux pansiviliq ru.
S.TRANSL: 我會帶便當。
I would bring the mealbox with me.

S.FORM: musa' i maniq su tahbuyi i samkayk ru.
S.TRANSL: 我去Samkayk(吃)豆腐乳。
I went to Samkayk to have fermented soybean curd.

S.FORM: humakay ru qutux riax ga musa' pakaragiyax sunga'.
S.TRANSL: 以前去大湖走路要走一天。
In the past it took one day to walk to Pakaragiyax.

S.FORM: gi humakay gi vali kia a kulu' sunga'.
S.TRANSL: 我們走路，因為以前沒有車子。
(We) walked there, because there was no car before.

S.FORM: ru muwah i musa' kariax kia ru muwah humakay lawi qutux ri'ax la a gavian la mi.
S.TRANSL: 然後我去那邊吃中飯，然後再走路回來。這樣就一天了，就天黑了。
by the time the sun had set.

S.FORM: vali asi nku hani la ga musa' ga su pilapilag musa' ru muwah.
S.TRANSL: 不像現在你去的時候，去一下子，又回來。
It was unlike now that it takes you just a little time to go back and forth.

S.FORM: ini' kanga' muwah gi kiya a kulu' la ru.
S.TRANSL: 你會很快回來，因為有車。
You can come back quickly because now we have cars.

S.FORM: sunga' hiya' ga aqih kinqiyanux i.
S.TRANSL: 以前是生活不好。
The life before was not good.

S.FORM: ini' u ukas a pila'.
S.TRANSL: 以前沒有錢。
There was no money.

S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' hiya'.
S.TRANSL: 以前老人家們也沒有錢。
The old men had no money before.

S.FORM: uwal ga.
S.TRANSL: 是啊。
Yes.

S.FORM: rasun sami matawwaw nku yava' yaya' ga.
S.TRANSL: 父母親帶我們去工作。
Father and Mother brought us to work.

S.FORM: jusi tumuvux a.
S.TRANSL: 就是播種。
It was just sowing.

S.FORM: nanu' tumuvux ru pati' ga.
S.TRANSL: 就是播種，還有稻秧。
It was just sowing and rice plants.

S.FORM: tumuvux ru mumuwa' su kgi.
S.TRANSL: 我們播種然後種苧蔴。
(We) sowed and grew the Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: kgi ga.
S.TRANSL: 苧蔴。
The Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: ka kamagisan ru vinasun ga ku kgi ka yani.
S.TRANSL: 我們把它去皮然後賣掉苧蔴。
(We) had it peeled off there and sold the Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: ku nanuwan.
S.TRANSL: 是什麼?
What is it?

S.FORM: nanu' tinunun ku ruma'.
S.TRANSL: 有些拿來編織。
There was some for weaving.

S.FORM: la ru mumuwa' su payux la ru tinunun ku ruma' ga ga vinasun ku ruma'.
S.TRANSL: 我們種了很多苧蔴，有些拿來編織。有些拿來賣。
We grew a lot of Chinese silk plants and had some for weaving, some for trading.

S.FORM: nanu' u kiya mavaynay kiya ku vavinasan su kgi nanuka' la ga kgi la ga.
S.TRANSL: 就是有拿來賣。有賣苧蔴和乾的苧蔴。
There was just buying. There was selling Chinese silk plants and dry Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: kiya pila' la gi ku payux la ku.
S.TRANSL: 因為有很多苧蔴，所以我們有錢。
We had money because there was a lot of Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: pamuwaun ka kgi la ru nanu' u kia halan mavaynay la ga kia pila' la.
S.TRANSL: 我們種苧蔴，拿去賣然後就有錢了。
We grew Chinese silk plants just. We went to sell (them ) and we had money.

S.FORM: sku mana'aring han ga ukas ukas ku pinmuwa' niyam ka vavinasun ga.
S.TRANSL: 一開始的時候，沒有東西可以種來賣。
In the very beginning, there was nothing that we grew for sale.

S.FORM: nanu' nanuka' ga tiku nanuka' ga ga kanukaun ga.
S.TRANSL: 乾的苧蔴曬乾後綁在一起。
They were dried by sunshine and tied together

S.FORM: kanukaun ru payux ku vakuwi la ga.
S.TRANSL: 很多都曬乾再綁起來。
A lot of them were dried and tied together.

S.FORM: patisaun la ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們再把它們製成線。
(We ) made (them) threads.

S.FORM: jusi palawsun la.
S.TRANSL: 我們做成線。
(We) made (them) threads.

S.FORM: palawsun la ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們做成線。
(We) made (them) threads.

S.FORM: magawayay la ga.
S.TRANSL: 做成線。
(We) made (them) threads.

S.FORM: magawayay tahkun la.
S.TRANSL: 做成線之後拿去煮。
(We) made (them) threads and cooked (for later dying).

S.FORM: tahkun ru pugian ru marngu' la ga.
S.TRANSL: 煮了之後拿去曬乾。
(We) had (them) cooked, exposed to the sun, and dried.

S.FORM: la ga hangaun su a'imaw.
S.TRANSL: 把這些東西拿去浸。
(We) immersed the things (for dying) to be mixed.

S.FORM: payux ku asiki kiya ku a'imaw niya' ga.
S.TRANSL: 很多的(染料)。一定要有攪拌的東西。
A lot of (dying ingredients). There must be things (dying ingredients) to be mixed.

S.FORM: makalux ga makalux magturakis ga mgaturakis matasiq ga matasiq.
S.TRANSL: 黑色的就是黑色，小米色的就是小米色，綠色的就是綠色。
Black is black. The millet color is the millet color. Green is then Green.

S.FORM: ru hangaun na hasa ga.
S.TRANSL: 然後用那個浸泡。
And the (threads) was immersed.

S.FORM: makalux ga.
S.TRANSL: 就是黑色。
It's black.

S.FORM: hangaun na avaw na hukilu' hangaun slaq ga.
S.TRANSL: 我們用九芎樹的葉子浸，浸在稀泥裡。
had them immersed in mud.

S.FORM: qamasan na avaw na h avaw na hukilu' han ru.
S.TRANSL: 用葉子浸，先用九芎樹的葉子。
Subcostata.

S.FORM: tapaqun ku avaw na hukilu' ru siqumas suku wayay ga.
S.TRANSL: 我們用力搥打九芎樹的葉子，再和線混合。
the threads.

S.FORM: ru halan humangu sku slaq ka slaq suvalay ka lamlam ga.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們去浸在田裡，真的在水田裡這樣做。
watery mud.

S.FORM: halan humangu' kiya ru makarusa' la ga alun la.
S.TRANSL: 浸在那裡然後兩天後再拿出來。
(We) went to (have them) immersed and took them out two days later.

S.FORM: la ga makalux la.
S.TRANSL: 就變成黑色了。
Then it turned black.

S.FORM: ru tiku ku maru' hiya' ga kamti' hangaun na kamti' ru matasiq ga kiya ku ki'man ga kiya ga ku ki'man.
S.TRANSL: 然後，薯榔，薯榔。和薯榔一起浸泡，有草讓它們變綠。
And Dioscorea Matsudae. Dioscorea Matsudae. We had them immersed with Dioscorea Matsudae and there were grasses to make them greeen.

S.FORM: ana sku hani ga kia ku ki'man.
S.TRANSL: 到現在還有這種草。
There is such grass until now.

S.FORM: tapaqun ku yani ru siqumas kiya la ga matasiq la.
S.TRANSL: 把它搗爛然後和線團揉合在一起，就變成綠色。
(We) pounded it and massaged the threads with it, so it was green.

S.FORM: payux ga ga aqih gi ini' ini' mu qavaqani kumal ku asiki talan.
S.TRANSL: 很多我都不會描述，要看到東西才行。
There is a lot that I can't describe. I need to have it here.

S.FORM: uwal a.
S.TRANSL: 是啊。
Yes.

S.FORM: pat u pa' u wayay la ga.
S.TRANSL: 就變成線了。
It then becomes threads.

S.FORM: parumulun la.
S.TRANSL: 就變成線團。
(We) make it into balls of threads.

S.FORM: parumulun la ru ju.
S.TRANSL: 把它繞成線團。
(We) coil them into balls.

S.FORM: qalasayun la.
S.TRANSL: 我們把線繞(在織布機上)。
(We) coil the threads (on the weaving box).

S.FORM: qalasayun la ru tinunun la.
S.TRANSL: 我們繞線(在織布機上)，然後編織。
(We) coil the threads and weave.

S.FORM: ru ru kiya a la tiku lin tiku linamu' ga.
S.TRANSL: 然後有配好的顏色。
And there is chosen stuff

S.FORM: velayq talan ku linamu' ga vaq su waw ma.
S.TRANSL: 顏色配得好看，(別人)就說(這個人)很會做(編織的)事。
If the chosen colors look good, others will say that you are good at weaving.

S.FORM: yow ukas a ukas a.
S.TRANSL: 喲，沒有，沒有。
Well, no, no.

S.FORM: a imi' nku asi nku yani hiya'.
S.TRANSL: 它意思就像那個。
Its meaning is like that.

S.FORM: na naqu ga i gaga' na itaal ga ukas.
S.TRANSL: 本族人沒有這個習俗。
Our tribemen do not have such a convention.

S.FORM: ukas ku maha asiki kiya ku lngaw niya' ga.
S.TRANSL: 沒有人說它(紋路的編織)必須有方向。
No one says that there must be certain ways of pattern weaving.

S.FORM: asiki kiya ku i mahananu' ku lin mu mayung niya' ga.
S.TRANSL: 有時候我配好的顏色要有某些紋路。
Sometimes there must be some pattern for my chosen colors.

S.FORM: asiki kiya ku lngaw niya' ma ukas ku mwani.
S.TRANSL: 有人說一定照著某個模樣，可是沒有這樣子。
Some say that (we) have to follow a pattern in weaving, but it is not so.

S.FORM: asiki.
